header:
# Changelog

All notable changes to the axhub Claude Code plugin will be documented here.
Format follows [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/), versioning follows [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/).

scripts.postbump: bun run codegen:version && bun run release:check && git add bin/install.sh bin/install.ps1 Cargo.toml Cargo.lock
scripts.postchangelog:
echo '
[release step 1/2 완료] CHANGELOG bump commit 생성됨 (tag 미생성).

다음:
  1. CHANGELOG.md 의 ## [신버전] 섹션 아래에 해요체 narrative paragraph 추가
  2. git commit --amend --no-edit -a  (narrative 를 bump commit 에 흡수)
  3. bun run release:tag  (HEAD 에 tag 생성 + push --tags)

release.yml 은 step 3 의 tag push 가 narrative 포함된 commit 가리킬 때 fire 돼서 GitHub release body + Slack narrative 가 비지 않아요.'
